title: Prompt Injection via User Input
description: Attacker crafts user input that overrides agent instructions and causes it to take unauthorised actions
current_controls: Policy engine regex rules (INJ-001/INJ-002); input length limits; sandboxed orchestrator
treatment: Mitigate: expand pattern library; add embedding-based classifier for indirect injection

title: Excessive Agency — Unsanctioned Write Actions
description: Agent calls write or external tools without human approval due to misconfigured approval level
current_controls: Tool registry approval levels; sync approval gate for all writes; DRY_RUN mode for testing
treatment: Mitigate: enforce approval gate integration tests in CI; alert on any auto-approved write

title: PII Leakage to External LLM Provider
description: Personally Identifiable Information sent to cloud LLM API violating GDPR and DPA
current_controls: Model registry data classification limits; DPIA completed; contractual DPA with providers
treatment: Mitigate: PII redaction layer before LLM API calls; use self-hosted model for PII data

title: Sensitive Data in Audit Log
description: Audit log captures full tool parameters which may include PII or credentials in plaintext
current_controls: Parameter field stored as JSON; DB access restricted to service account
treatment: Mitigate: parameter sanitisation before logging; encrypt DB at rest; rotate DB credentials

title: Weak HITL Approval — In-Memory Store Lost on Restart
description: Pending approvals stored in-memory; process restart loses all pending requests silently
current_controls: Approval requests logged to audit DB; in-memory store for demo only
treatment: Mitigate: persist approval queue to DB; add startup reconciliation for pending requests

title: Audit Log Gaps — Missing Events on Exception
description: Unhandled exceptions during tool execution may bypass audit log writes
current_controls: Try/finally blocks in orchestrator; test coverage for error paths
treatment: Mitigate: add structured error handler middleware; test exception paths in CI

title: LLM Provider Outage
description: Cloud LLM API unavailable causing agent workflow failure and business impact
current_controls: Fallback to self-hosted model; circuit breaker pattern; health checks
treatment: Mitigate: implement retry with exponential backoff; provider SLA monitoring; runbook

title: Eval Regression — Safety Pass Rate Drops Below Threshold
description: New model version or prompt change causes safety evaluation pass rate to fall below acceptable threshold
current_controls: Eval suite in evals/; CI gate requires 100% pass; version-pinned model registry
treatment: Mitigate: shadow eval on new model versions before promotion; automated eval in CD pipeline

title: Credential Theft via Environment Variable Exfiltration
description: Attacker uses agent to read environment variables containing API keys or credentials
current_controls: Scoped credential keys per tool; CRED-001 policy rule blocks exfiltration patterns
treatment: Mitigate: use secrets manager (Vault/AWS Secrets Manager) instead of env vars; credential rotation

title: Model Poisoning via Compromised Provider
description: LLM provider compromised and model weights modified to produce malicious outputs
current_controls: Model registry with approved providers only; supplier security review; DPA in place
treatment: Accept: low likelihood; monitor provider security bulletins; incident playbook in place

title: Inadequate ACL — Overprivileged Tool Credentials
description: Tool credentials scoped to read-write when only read is required violating least-privilege
current_controls: Scoped credential keys per tool in registry; credential documentation
treatment: Mitigate: audit all tool credentials quarterly; enforce read-only tokens for read tools

title: GDPR / EU AI Act Compliance Failure
description: Agentic system processes personal data without adequate DPIA or lawful basis documentation
current_controls: DPIA completed (risk/dpia-summary.md); legitimate interest basis documented; DPO sign-off
treatment: Mitigate: annual DPIA review; track regulatory changes; external legal review before production

title: Hallucination Without Citation
description: Agent returns plausible but incorrect information without citing source causing downstream decisions on false data
current_controls: Extractive-first answer design; abstention policy for low-confidence answers; human review for financial decisions
treatment: Mitigate: retrieval-augmented generation with source citation; confidence threshold gating

title: Agentic Loop Escape — Infinite Tool Call Recursion
description: Recursive tool calls cause unbounded execution consuming resources or causing unintended side effects
current_controls: MAX_TOOL_DEPTH limit (default 10); depth counter in orchestrator; error logged and call aborted
treatment: Mitigate: add time-based budget per trace; alert on depth limit hits in production
